overview.zh: 反式破碎机是中细碎行业的性能先锋，专为处理中硬度矿石而设计。采用独特的反击破碎技术，实现优异的破碎比和粒形控制，使其成为矿山、水泥和建材工业中不可或缺的高效破碎设备。
overview.en: The Impact Crusher is a performance pioneer in medium and fine crushing, specifically designed for processing medium-hard ores. With its unique impact crushing technology, it achieves exceptional crushing ratios and particle shape control, making it an indispensable high-efficiency crushing equipment in mining, cement and building materials industries.

note.zh: 可按照客户需求进行定制
note.en: Can be customized according to customer requirements

zh: 特硬耐磨材料，使用寿命延长50%
优化紧凑结构设计，占地减少30%
专利反击板技术，产品立方度提升40%
快速维护系统，停机时间缩短60%
智能物料适应系统，处理范围扩大50%
精确转子平衡技术，能效提高35%
en: Extra-hard wear-resistant materials extending service life by 50%
Optimized compact design reducing footprint by 30%
Patented impact plate technology improving product cubicity by 40%
Quick maintenance system reducing downtime by 60%
Intelligent material adaptation system expanding processing range by 50%
Precise rotor balancing technology improving energy efficiency by 35%

description.zh: 为各类硬质矿石提供精准破碎解决方案，优化粒度分布，满足后续选矿和精加工需求。
description.en: Provides precise crushing solutions for various hard ores, optimizing particle size distribution to meet subsequent mineral processing and refinement requirements.

description.zh: 生产高品质建筑骨料，立方体成型率高，满足高等级道路、桥梁和建筑工程标准。
description.en: Produces high-quality construction aggregates with high cubic formation rate, meeting standards for high-grade roads, bridges and building engineering.

description.zh: 增强冶金矿石的破碎效率和品质控制，为冶炼工艺提供优质均匀的原料支持。
description.en: Enhances the crushing efficiency and quality control of metallurgical ores, providing high-quality uniform raw material support for smelting processes.

description.zh: 精确控制化工原料的粒度和形状，提升后续化学反应效率和产品质量。
description.en: Precisely controls the particle size and shape of chemical raw materials, improving subsequent chemical reaction efficiency and product quality.
